build.beforeBuildCommand: cd server-jarvis && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target bun && cd ../src-ui && bun run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: tauri:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:*
